_comment: Ticker registry: canonical symbol -> display metadata. Keyed by the canonical symbol (Taiwan: bare 4-digit number; US: ticker). 'aliases' lists other forms seen in episode data (e.g. '2330.TW'). Used by shared.tickers.lookup_ticker / canonical_symbol; consumed by wiki_builder.ingest_episode to set real names + market on entity pages, by services/podcast/scripts/reenrich_entities_from_registry.py to backfill those onto existing pages, and (TODO) by knowledge_graph seed_tickers_to_db. Extend freely — unknown tickers fall back to the raw symbol.
